DESCRIPTION: ADT (Admit/Discharge/Transfer) events. Each row is one patient movement event (census, transfer, discharge).
Hospital bed definitions. Links bed identifiers to bed labels and locations.
Department master. Contains department names, abbreviations, revenue locations, and service areas.
Employer/payor master. Contains payor names and identifiers for insurance coverage.
Location master. Contains location abbreviations and identifiers for hospital campuses/facilities.
Room master. Contains room names and identifiers.
Service area master. Contains service area names (e.g., inpatient, outpatient, ED).
Insurance coverage membership. Links patients to their coverage/insurance plans with effective dates.
Chronicles statistics execution log. Tracks ETL job runs with execution times.
Date dimension table for reporting. Contains year, quarter, month name, month number for each calendar date.
Inpatient hospital patient days fact table. One row per patient per census day, used for inpatient census reporting.
Patient demographics master. Contains MRN, name, birth date, language, address, and demographic codes.
Extended patient demographics. Contains gender identity, sex assigned at birth, and additional demographic fields.
Patient MyChart enrollment. Contains MyChart activation status for patient portal access.
Patient race records. Multiple rows per patient for multi-racial patients, with line numbers.
Patient coverage filing order. Determines primary, secondary, tertiary insurance ordering.
Patient encounters. One row per clinical encounter (visit, appointment, admission).
Hospital patient encounters. Extended encounter data for inpatient stays including discharge disposition.
Patient relationships (caregivers, guardians, emergency contacts). Links patients to their related persons.
Patient relationship history. Tracks start/end dates of caregiver relationships.
Languages spoken by patient relationships (caregivers). Tracks spoken language for each caregiver.
Coverage payor plan view. Combines coverage, payor, and benefit plan information for insurance reporting.
Patient ADT location history view. Tracks room and bed assignments for each ADT event.
Country reference table. Maps country codes to country names.
County reference table. Maps county codes to county names.
Discharge disposition reference. Maps disposition codes to descriptions (home, SNF, expired, etc.).
Emergency patient relationship types. Maps relationship codes to descriptions (parent, spouse, guardian, etc.).
Ethnicity reference table. Maps ethnicity codes to descriptions (Hispanic/Latino, Not Hispanic, etc.).
Gender identity reference table. Maps gender identity codes to descriptions.
Language reference table. Maps language codes to language names (English, Spanish, etc.).
MyChart status reference. Maps MyChart activation status codes to descriptions.
Patient race reference table. Maps race codes to descriptions (White, Black, Asian, etc.).
Patient class reference. Maps patient class codes to abbreviations (Inpatient, Outpatient, ED, etc.).
Patient service reference. Maps hospital service codes to abbreviations (Medicine, Surgery, Pediatrics, etc.).
Legal sex reference table. Maps sex codes to descriptions.
Sex assigned at birth reference table. Maps codes to descriptions.
State reference table. Maps state codes to state names.
